vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to avionics bay heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Implement cooling fins and thermal management system.

risk.desc: Landing gear mount may experience high loads during landing.
risk.mit: Increase landing gear mount thickness and add reinforcement ribs.

risk.desc: Wing spar socket may not be able to handle maximum rotor thrust.
risk.mit: Review and reinforce wing spar socket design.

risk.desc: Camera window may be prone to damage from debris.
risk.mit: Add protective cover or shield for camera window.

risk.desc: Service access panel may be difficult to open in tight spaces.
risk.mit: Design service access panel with easier opening mechanism.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Tilting rotor nacelle with 0-90deg tilt axis

physics_paths.description: Rotor thrust load is transferred through tilt axis and bearing seats to wing structure.
Servo-driven worm gear rotates the tilt axis.
Motor and ESC are mounted in a pocket with access for maintenance.

Linkage between the servo and the tilt axis.
Arc for the nacelle tilt range.
Socket to attach to the wing spar.

Cover for maintenance access to the motor and ESC.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Tilt axis with bearing seats, servo linkage, rotation clearance arc

physics_paths.description: Torque from tilt servo transfers through bearing seat into wing structure.
Servo drives tilt axis, enabling nacelle rotation.
Heat from rotor nacelle is dissipated through servo mount.
Servo and linkage maintenance access through service cover.
Electrical power and control signals from harness to servo.

integration_opportunities.description: Tilt axis connects to rotor nacelle for pitch control.
Bearing seat fits into wing structure for load transfer.
Electrical harness connects to connector mate for power and control.

verification_focus.description: Verify tilt axis can handle 25kg-cm torque.
Verify alignment and fit of all interfaces.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to wide temperature range (-20 to +50C).
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks and insulation.

risk.desc: Risk of corrosion in saltwater environments.
risk.mit: Use corrosion-resistant materials or coatings.

risk.desc: Potential for wheel lock-up during high-speed maneuvers.
risk.mit: Design with anti-lock braking system or other wheel lock prevention mechanisms.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to high loads during takeoff and landing.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and ensure material strength is sufficient.

risk.desc: Potential for fastener loosening over time due to vibration.
risk.mit: Use vibration-resistant fasteners and regular maintenance checks.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase
physics_paths: load_path: from wheel contact to gear leg, then to landing_gear_mount, then to fuselage_spine
thermal_path: heat from wheel contact to gear leg, then to landing_gear_mount, then to fuselage_spine
motion_path: wheel rotation, gear leg extension/retraction
human_access_path: service access for wheel replacement and gear maintenance
integration_opportunities: landing_gear_mount can integrate with fuselage_spine and wing_spar
gear_leg can integrate with skid_arm and wheel
pivot_joint can integrate with gear_leg and landing_gear_mount

risk.desc: The design may not account for thermal expansion and contraction.
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion joints and material selection that minimizes thermal effects.

risk.desc: The harness slack loop might not accommodate all expected cable lengths.
risk.mit: Review and adjust the slack loop dimensions based on actual cable lengths.
